title: Carmen Massage C82020 Cordless Mini-Massage Gun with 6 Speed Settings, 4 Massage Heads, LED Indicator Lights, Compact and Portable, White
features: POWERFUL HIGH SPEED ELECTRIC MOTOR: With up to 2800 percussions per minute this powerful massage gun delivers deep muscle treatment, relieving muscle stiffness and tension, improving blood circulation and helping sore muscles to heal faster after a strenuous workout

INTERCHANGEABLE MASSAGE HEADS: Equipped with 4 interchangeable massage heads that offer alternatively shaped designs to target different areas of the body for precise relief and to improve recovery; Choose from a Round head, U-shape head, Pointed head and Flat head for a complete massage experience

6 SPEED SETTINGS: Six versatile speed settings will let you tailor the intensity of your massage to suit your needs; With a speed range of 1200-2800 RPM, you can focus on daily relaxation and warm-up, gentle massage, Fascia relaxation, lactic acid decomposition, deep massage or a full professional mode for in-depth, focussed pain relief

CORDLESS USE: Cordless operation offers unrestricted movement so you can use the massage gun with one hand without being restricted by a plug socket; The rechargeable battery offers up to 4 hours of use, so you can enjoy a full massage experience without having to rush
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Assured quality with a 1 year guarantee with an optional 2 year extension subject to product registration online
description: Product Description Get the optimal massage on the go with this Cordless Mini Massage Gun from the Carmen massage series. Packed with power and 6 different speed settings, this massage gun provides up to 2800 percussions per minute, relieving muscle stiffness and tension and improving blood circulation. It comes with 4 interchangeable massage heads that allow you to tailor your massage to suit your needs and preferences. The round head is optimal for use on large massage groups, the U-shape head relieves pain in trapezius muscles such as the ankles, achilles tendon and calf muscles, a bullet head for targeting key triggers points such as feet and a flat head to relieve muscle tension after intense exercise. Ergonomically designed to fit comfortably in your hand, it is cordless so you can use it one handed without being restricted by plug sockets or cables, whilst it offers 4 hours of uninterrupted use. 6 LED lights will show you the battery level when charging and your selected speed setting for seamless use, whilst it is portable and fits comfortably in your bag so can be taken with you to the gym or when travelling for convenience. Directions 1. Charge the device before use. 2. Select an appropriate massage head based on the target body area. 3. Choose a suitable speed setting based on the desired intensity and target area. 4. Apply the massager to the target area, using gentle, circular motions. 5. Avoid using the massager on injured or inflamed areas. 6. Clean the massage heads after each use. Safety Warning May cause injury if not used properly. Do not use on injured areas. Avoid applying excessive pressure. Keep away from water. Always unplug and turn off before cleaning. Do not use while sleeping or unconscious. Consult a healthcare professional before use if you have any medical conditions or are pregnant. Always follow the instructions provided with the product. See more
